name: neural-weights-en-us
model_lineage: v1.9.1-multilocale-3order / step 40000 — the FIRST multi-locale retrain to IMPROVE EU parse-recall on the SHIPPED assembled coordinate. Clones v1.8.0-fr-admin-split EXCEPT one added lever: the overture-multilocale shard (source-weight 3.0) — 2.4M real Overture address rows across 16 EU locales (ES/IT/NL/PT/BE/PL/DE/AT/CH/CZ/DK/NO/SE/FI/HR/SI/SK), each row rendered in 3 natural orders (canonical / postcode-first / locality-first, scripts/rerender-overture-multiorder.mjs). It teaches the non-en/fr EU street+locality FORMATS the model never saw, in every word order. RESULT (held-out OA coordinate panel, resolve rate): IT 79→92.7, PT 52→82, PL 53→62, AT 50→81.3, CZ 43→52 (+9..+31pp over v1.8.0; p50-resolved sub-2km IT/PT/PL = real recall, not false-resolve). Guardrails HELD on the shipped coordinate: US locality-match 83.4→84.1 (+0.7, 44-state holdout), FR resolve 0.80=0.80 / p50 1.28→1.22km. The predecessor v1.9.0 used the SAME shard rendered ALL-CANONICAL and REGRESSED every EU locale (order-overfit — the model learned 'locality = last token-group' and emitted the street as locality on pc-first/city-first orders); the 3-order rendering is the one-knob fix (same 2.4M rows, same weight). source_weights is a multinomial over sources, so the RENDERING — not the weight — was the lever. Diagnosed via dump-and-read (scripts/eval/locality-emit-diff.ts).
phase: v1.9.1 multi-locale 3-order — teach EU street+locality formats in all word orders; first multi-locale retrain to improve EU parse-recall (IT/PT/PL/AT/CZ resolve +9..+31pp) at zero US/FR coordinate cost

training.corpus_version: 0.5.0 (char-offset span labels #519: from-source base + 7 re-emitted parity overlays) + synth-fr-order shard (#561) + fr-admin-split shard (v0.8.0-fr-admin-split: real BAN commune+postcode+département, locality split from région)
training.recipe: v1.8.0-fr-admin-split: cloned v1.5.0-fr-order verbatim (from-scratch 40k on the char-offset corpus + synth-fr-order shard weight 3.0) + the fr-admin-split shard (weight 6.0, matching synth-german — the single added variable). conventions loss-mask OFF (the shard TEACHES FR street_prefix 'Rue'; the mask would −inf gold — caught live v1.6.0). All else held identical to v1.5.0-fr-order (augment_glue_prob 0.25, synth-intersection 1.0, synth-po-box-cedex 1.5, synth-german 6.0, affix relabel, gazetteer anchor + choreography, CE-only, lr=1.5e-4, seed 42). Loss-abort gate PASSED (loss 5.0 → ~0.7, decreasing).

requires.$comment: The SHIP-CONFIG this model was TRAINED against (#718) — UNCHANGED from v1.5.0 (v1.8.0 cloned the v1.5.0-fr-order ship config; the single training variable was the fr-admin-split shard). The canonical ProductionScorer (@mailwoman/neural's createScorer) reads this and FAILS CLOSED if a required channel isn't actually fed — closing the #566/#685 trap where a channel-trained model scored channel-OFF silently goes OOD. Read off the gate it shipped against (scripts/eval/gates/v0.5.0-bridge.json: requires_gazetteer_lexicon=true, requires_conventions=auto, requires_bridge=false) plus anchor (the model exports anchor_features). Additive metadata only.

notes: v4.13.0 / v1.9.1-multilocale-3order — adds the overture-multilocale 3-ORDER shard on top of v1.8.0. The model was en-us/fr-only on full-address FORMAT (base = US sources + ban=FR + synth-german=DE + synth-fr-*; WOF teaches place NAMES, not street-address format), so non-FR/DE EU addresses resolved at ~50% — the #229 coordinate panel root-caused the gap to PARSE recall, not gazetteer coverage. The lever: 2.4M real Overture rows across 16 EU locales, each rendered canonical/pc-first/locality-first (scripts/rerender-overture-multiorder.mjs), source-weight 3.0. RESULT (held-out OA coordinate, resolve rate): IT 79→92.7, PT 52→82, PL 53→62, AT 50→81.3, CZ 43→52 (+9..+31pp). Guardrails HELD on the shipped coordinate: US locality-match 83.4→84.1 (+0.7, 44-state holdout — 9 states gain >1pp incl IN 68→90, 4 dip ≤2.7pp), FR resolve flat / p50 1.28→1.22km. Three US LABEL-F1 deltas trip the ±1pp gate but are CONFIRMED coordinate-invisible by grading the assembled coordinate (the #566 discipline): country −6.6 (US is the resolver default — country is never the US coord lever), us.locality −2.2 (precision-only, a documented recurring delta), venue −1.2. The PREDECESSOR v1.9.0 shipped the SAME shard ALL-CANONICAL and REGRESSED every EU locale (order-overfit: 'locality = last token-group' → emitted the street as locality on non-canonical orders); the 3-order rendering is the one-knob fix (same 2.4M rows, same source-weight 3.0 — source_weights is a multinomial over sources, so the RENDERING, not the weight, was the lever). Diagnosed by dump-and-read (scripts/eval/locality-emit-diff.ts). Ship-config (requires) UNCHANGED from v1.8.0/v1.5.0 — anchor+gazetteer+conventions(auto), bridge retired. Tokenizer 0.6.0-a0 (byte-identical). KNOWN: int8 max fp32↔int8 delta ~0.3pp. GB/IE/HU/SE produced 0 Overture rows (no open address feed) — SE fillable via Lantmäteriet (HVD/CC-BY), the rest gated.

format.model: ONNX int8 dynamic (quantized from fp32, max fp32↔int8 delta 0.3pp)

calibration.method: isotonic-regression (PAVA) over per-span softmax confidence; OPT-IN via core/decoder createCalibrator
calibration.note: calibration.json + calibration-per-locale.json carried forward from v4.4.0 (architecture + label space unchanged across v1.5.0→v1.8.0). Re-fit recommended next train. Apply via @mailwoman/core/decoder's createCalibrator; default parse output is byte-stable when omitted.

gate_2026_06_19_fr_admin_split.promotion_gate: FR centroid gate PASS — surpasses v1.5.0 on the SHIPPED assembled anchor-ON coordinate (held-out FR golden, 3000 disjoint communes): coord p50 42.5→2.2 km, mean 175→105.5 km (−40%), région-emit 39.6→99.6%. US assembled coordinate FLAT (oa-resolver-eval, 2000 OA-US rows: locality-match 97.5→97.6, p50 3.3=3.3). Two label deltas trip the 2pp pre-publish gate, BOTH coordinate-invisible and operator-approved (#728): us.locality −2.2 (precision-only, 0 recall misses) and fr.country −3.5 (resolver given --default-country FR). No silent drift — both stated here + on #728 + the night postmortem.
flagged_deltas_coordinate_invisible: us.locality -2.2 (precision-only — 0 recall misses, spurious-FP on gold-locality-absent rows)
fr.country -3.5 (resolver given --default-country FR, never reaches the coordinate; abandoned v1.8.1 country-shard targeted this)

per_component_int8_shipconfig.$comment: per-locale-f1 anchor-ON matched pair vs v1.5.0 (postmortem guardrail tables). The unfolded per-tag F1 (split affix, intersections, etc.) is the authoritative `capabilities` block below. Tags off the FR-shard path (us intersections/unit, de native_locality, arena.perturb) were not re-measured for v1.8.0 — the single training variable was the FR admin-split shard and the architecture is identical to v1.5.0.

vs_1_5_0.fr_coord_p50: 42.5 → 2.2 km (−95%) — the win; first model in the arc to beat v1.5.0 on the shipped coordinate

capabilities.$comment: Per-tier (server=anchor+gazetteer; pocket=anchor-only) × address-system × tag capability manifest (#718/#719). maskOffF1 = measured per-tag exact-match F1 with the conventions mask OFF; maskOnF1 = the same with mask ON (recorded only for tags some codex forbiddenTags row suppresses — the loader's delta-gate consults only those). createScorer FAILS CLOSED when a conventions row forbids a tag with maskOffF1 − maskOnF1 > 0.05 (the mask provably destroys a real capability). Generated by scripts/eval/gen-capability-manifest.ts against the v1.5.0 int8.
